reviews.review_description: A lot of little kids do like to spawn camp and kill you, but simply leave the game and host one instead. A lot of little kids write reviews about spawn camping and spam killing everyone. This game is great to play with your friends an an awsome physics based game! There is a lot of combat and it now has more maps to play in! Hop in DOWNSHOT and get your combat going! 🔫

-DETAILS-

1. Being able to break more stuff.
Being able to break stuff such as chairs and other things will really help the need of realism. Such as things like the pot prop.

2. Add sunbeams to water and sun.
Adding sunbeams to most of those things would increase the realism as well. But it can only be toggled through settings.

3. Add shade levels.
If you don’t know what I mean by “shade levels”, I mean by the size of the certain block or object could increase in shadow. Like the center of a huge roof should be pitch black.


-RECOMMENDATIONS-

1. Add lava!
Adding lava would be really cool to do. It could also be put into a pot to cook animals.

2. Add animals!
Adding animals such as cows and pigs would be really cool! If you would kill one and use its ragdoll, you could cook it over lava!

3. Add more bombs!
You could perhaps unlock most of the bombs in arena. Like adding a missile, or something like tnt!

4. Add custom bullets!
Adding custom bullets would be great for combat, such as the explosive bullet, or the poison bullet.

5. Add random disasters!
These disasters can only be toggled in settings, and will have an intensity meter. Such things like tsunamis in water maps, or things like supernovas in space.
NOTE: THE DISASTERS CAN ONLY BE INITIATED WITHIN 10 MINUTES OF BEING IN THE MAP!

6. Add saving maps feature!
Maps such as ocean could have weapons on a build or something that could be saved with the menu. It would be in the maps category under all the options, highlighted.

7. Add day/night cycle to all maps!
Note this feature can only be used by toggling in the menu.

8. Add a Settings gun!
This feature would be in experimental, and would be used on things like a flashlight,or any type of car. Like you could change the speed or drift of a car, like a flashlight could have a changed light or color.

Please don’t take all of this seriously I’m not putting you at gunpoint or smth all im doing is recommending options.

Bye! :D

reviews.review_title: My honest opinion about this game
reviews.review_description:
It doesn't have the best physics stuff but although it is not that bad. The graphics is really good tho. The mods are kinda boring and hard to find good mods but the main problem is there are no search bar. The other bad part is that you can barely break anything and the NPCs are not the best. But it is still enjoyable as a free sandbox "BoneLab" type of game. I recommend playing this game since it free and fun. The only thing I really want the developers to make in this game is a story mode since it would be really cool!

The game is still in early acces tho so stuff will be changed and the physics and garphics will be better

Let me rant here, alright? I've had this game for a while (not to flex). So you can trust me over some whiney little kid complaining about not enough guns. This game is amazing. It's like if you took Vrchat and put it on steroids. Everything about it is great, except for one tiny thing. Something that tells you exactly about the dev, something that lets you know if you want this game, something that nobody likes nor wants! That's right, it's MIRCOTRANSACTIONS. Here me out. I think if you take a game and lock 50% of it behind a paywall, it's gonna be a mid game. You can still do all sorts of stuff, but it's gonna be nerfed down. Speaking of nerf, PLEASE OH GOD NERF THE TITAN AND GOLEM! I'm not joking when I say it's MENT to be paid to win. "But oh Symbol, just use the gun gun!" SOME PEOPLE DONT HAVE THE GUN GUN! Also, everything passed the VIP pack, and Monster Pack sucks. It's all skins mid weapons. "But Symbol! The cars!" THE CARS ARE ALL THE SAME! But it's alright, it's okay. It just cost over 120$ to get them all. And I hear you, You don't HAVE to get them, let me ask you this. Did you HAVE to get you meta quest? Did you HAVE to sign up for Horizon Plus? Did you HAVE to spend 300 dollars on Gorrlia Tag? Exactly. Now, let's wrap this up. This game is great. It's practically free bonelab, but please lower the prices on some things. I would rather spend the time getting bonelab and bonelab fusion, WHICH IS LESS THAN GETTING ALL OF THEM! Then spend it on this game. Thanks for reading, have a good day.

reviews.review_title: Great game but I have some additions
reviews.review_description:
It’s a really fun game other than multiplayer griefing but I have a suggestion,
What if you made a public match but don’t want more ppl joining and griefing? Well I have an idea to stop that
It’s the “switch visibility” button! It can make games go from private to public or public to private! So you can keep the griefers away!

Any other than that, it’s an amazing game with great mechanics but there are some glitches like spawning in the wall when you join a match in theHQ map, but yeah that’s probably it! Amazing game!

(Sorry if I misspell smth, my screen broke and the sensitivity is wonky)

#game implement a bundle refund system

So today, I met a kid getting scammed for a pack. The host, the scammer, kicks me before I can say anything help the kid from getting scammed all in a span of 5 seconds. 
     The security system lacks basic requirements for reporting even after the host kicks you. The failed system lacks such requirements that follows: basic reporting system, absence of a place to submit reported evidence, and a way to stop hosts from abusing the kick to hide ToS violations. Even with a mute option, players are unable to report violations such as scamming and other illegal activity which are on your ToS.
     The game has countless bugs that from their discord server, requires you to restart. The mods tell you to restart the game any time you encounter a bug, failing to realize that it may be server side issue and not vr or the client's problem.
     The higher starred reviews compare this game to a paid game called BoneLab, focusing on the relevance rather than the game being severely unsafe for the people. Higher reviews also give suggestions for the game rather than actually reviewing their experience or what it is actually about.
     The game is severely unsafe and unstable with moderators telling their community it is a vr problem and failing to fix the bugs. Most, if not all, are server side that they blame vr for.

reviews.review_title: This game is pretty good however
reviews.review_description:
So this game is really fun with friends which is what’s it’s made for and is very similar to BoneLab but is free and has more differences but here’s what I mainly want.

A story mode.

Yes I want a story mode that wouldn’t feel out of place and is optional so you wouldn’t have to play it through to get to the chaos of the main game here’s what I have in mind for the story and if you want to include it then go for it.

Okay so I’m basing this off of the default robot avatar but the player wakes up in a factory that has dozens of robots and as you go through the factory there’s guns that the player can pick up as the player progresses through the factory you find robots that will attack the player until you reach the end of the factory which will take you to the next level.

Now of course you are the developer so I’ll let you do what you want but use this as the basis and the spawn gun should be disabled in the story mode however the player can get their friends to play with them

I deleted the app while ago and redownloaded it in the start of 2026 but all of a sudden i cant hear any one anymore and i cant delete or reinstall it because i spent 50+ bucks on it and i don't wanna lose any progress

I was looking for a fun, free sandbox game, and I came across Downshot. I was going into the game not expecting too much but I was SHOCKED at all the maps, items and tools you get for free! The add ons look fun and I will be considering buying them. The physics are great besides a few glitches where sometimes a weapon will fling itself but I was expecting something a little glitched, but this game is great and I just wanted to ask for a few features that I think many people would enjoy.

1. Syringes that could, for example: make an NPC invincible or something.

2. Lava or acid items or maps, I think many people would love pushing their friends into lava.

3. Breaking bones, I would love to be able to break a characters legs and prevent them from standing upright, I know you can glitch a characters limb to look like it’s broken but it doesn’t affect the character.

4. More achievement items, I have a great time looking for the little unlock-able items to test.

5. I would like a setting where you can set how long a dead NPC would stay in the game before disappearing.

6. More free cosmetics, I do like that you can get some free skins, but I would love if you could unlock more by completing missions or something along those measures.

7. I would like if all the NPCs could have a version that makes them friendly so you can get the same joy of adding friendly NPCs to whatever torture device you make.

8. Add a a way to search for mods instead of having to scroll through every mod.

Thank you for reading my review, and I hope that you have a great day. Bye! 🥹✌️

Some people leave false reviews to bringhe game down on purpose, theres rarely any rule break and if one happens you can always mute people and as a host kick. Even when joining multiplayer they give a warning of what can happen, please try the game instead of looking at bad reviews.

its almost perfect 
like just NEARLY there
but I have 3 MAJOR complaints
don't worry though I also go into major positives as well, as to ignore such things would be incredibly ignorant

also before I start going off, the reviews of people claiming the stuff they purchased didn't show up in the game are probably lying, I mean youre gonna tell me you "spent over 100 dollars on this game for your son" and you're not even gonna TRY to contact someone to get the money back when something happens? really? I'm not saying they're 100% fully confirmed lying, and if they aren't, I feel bad for you, but I just find it hard to believe, so I recommend taking those reviews with a grain of salt, now onto my actual review:

THE BAD:

1. Microtransactions

as of writing this review, the past 2 updates (full throttle and whatever the space one was called) have indeed added quite a few useful and fun items to mess around with, such as the grappler and the updated static build gun
HOWEVER.
I heavily dislike how the main points of the update have been locked behind 20 dollar paywalls.
for the space update, you get two items. TWO ITEMS. and 4 physiques for 20 dollars
then, in the full throttle update, you got 3 physiques and 3 cars
I feel like the prices are insanely unfair, especially when the main points of the update are hidden within them, and, I'm just gonna say it, they don't seem worth it at all
because, why spend 20-40 dollars for one or both the packs for like 7 things at most, when, if you buy the full bonus pack bundle, you get 6 vehicles, I'm pretty sure 6 weapons, aroundddd I wanna say like 5-6 physiques, as well as 4 different variations for the default robot, along with being able to change the color of your name, plus some of the avatars having different stats, AS WELL as multiple different props to play with. all this for the same price as buying the space or full throttle bundle by the way. its actually insane, plus the monster pack where you can get like 6 more physiques, with varying stats which can be useful in multiple different situations for even less money, whereas with the new packs, I'm pretty sure most, if not all the physiques you get from them are base stats.
I don't really see the point of this since most of the game's assets appear to be models bought off the unity store for free or at most 2 dollars or something, however I believe that it costs actual money to run multiplayer servers for a game, so if this is the case then perhaps I can be more sympathetic, as the game is just made by like one guy with minimal help from a couple of his friends, and this leads me into my next problem:

2. Hosting a server (and by extent, playing in one)

hosting a server can either be the time of your life or absolutely MISERABLE
if you host servers the way I do then you would know it's actually peak, you don't kick someone for killing you once or anything like that, you basically just let things play out the way they do and only kick people if they are GENUINELY annoying or unwell
the problems start to arise when you realize half the players are 7 year olds or people with the mentality of a 7 year old who do nothing but scream at you for shooting them once on accident and shout memes that died 3 years ago, and the other half is either people with no mic who do nothing but noclip around the map either spamming props or sniping people, or people who just join a server to start yelling racial slurs because their parents aren't home thinking it's the funniest thing anyone has ever thought of (it's not), so you'll end up kicking the entire server except for like one guy who is actually sane and the one friend you decided to play with, but I'm actually not gonna blame the developer for this, as I understand its basically impossible to control what kinds of people play your game, and I don't think we should be blaming the developers for what the players do, unless they actively encourage it, and as far as I'm aware, cmvr is not messaging random people on oculus and telling them to join random downshot servers and start doing everything they can to make the day of the people in the servers worse, I think some helpful additions would be a ban button, as you can actually rejoin a server after being kicked as long as you remember the code for it, which can be a major issue, the ability to add other players as "server admins," allowing them to kick anyone except the host and other admins. a vote kick option which anyone can call would also be great as well just in case the host is extremely biased and refuses to kick a certain person or is unsure whether someone deserves to be kicked or not.  speaking of which, most of the public lobbies you join will either have a host who kicks you for revenge killing them a single time, or a really annoying person that the host can't kick because they either can't see their name or can't hear people who are trying to tell them, there's no indicator for whether someone is speaking or not by the way. I'm pretty sure that's all I have to say for this section so I'm gonna move on now:

3. Lack of free stuff

this ties into my first point about the microtransactions, but basically there's almost nothing that's free by default or even unlockable in the game, the only free physiques you can get by playing the game are the default robot, ice skeleton, steel skeleton, and uranium skeleton
the ice skeleton is incredibly fast with the drawback being that it's also incredibly weak, and it can be found in the ice map. the steel skeleton has base stats except it has a bit more health I think, and can be unlocked by completing wave 50 in arena waves. the uranium skeleton is the best of the free physiques, having max health and ALMOST max speed, and is unlocked by completing wave 100 in arena waves, which I feel like would be incredibly hard using only the default robot, especially since it took me and my friend nearly a week to do using steel skeletons.  there are actually quite a few weapons that can be unlocked through arena waves or by finding them hidden in certain maps, around 8 I'd say.  there's no free vehicles (unless you count the hovercraft, but like, no) as well as the only unlockable props being a wearable astronaut helmet and VR headset.  there's nothing more to say here so now on to the final parts of the review:

THE GOOD:

I'm not gonna do another going by numbers thing here again so I'll just put down everything I like
the game, even with these issues, is still INSANELY fun with friends, there are multiple times where I've laughed for minutes straight because something stupid happened, plus it's a really good place to just have a talk with your friends while also having something else to do in the background, and with the addition of the new static build gun, you can literally build entire maps with it, allowing you to either expand on a map that's already in the game or completely change the theme of one of them, which is super useful for roleplays and stuff of the sort as it allows you to make anything fit with whatever theme or vibe you're going for, which is an absolute game changer for maps like gas station where you can straight up just copy the gas station's model, give it a different texture, and now you have the ability to create an entire town with different houses, restaurants, etc. so my advice would be to use the static build gun (found in tools by the way) to its fullest potential and start making whatever you want, even if you're not much of a roleplayer, you can still use it to make literally anything you want, the perfect campaign, sandbox, etc., just remember that the line is drawn literally as far as your creativity and imagination can go (everything I just told you about is free by the way).
there's much more good to say about this game but I don't have the time or motivation right now to do so, but I would describe downshot as a game that's almost perfect, only brought down by 3 key factors, mainly a lack of features and free content, but it is starting to receive monthly updates so even this might not be an issue for long (also I just remembered there's mod support which is also free so you theoretically could have or make even more than what I just described lol). and with that I will leave you with this final section:

THE UGLY:

the zombie's model

reviews.review_title: fun but NEEDS a moderation system
reviews.review_description: yeah the games fun and all but there’s kids who love to ruin it and be incredibly annoying so there should be a way to get rid of them. plus the games also pretty toxic overall

This game is super good. You can play with friends on private servers or make new friends on a public server, you can even host your own server and if someones trolling/putting out bad vibes you can kick them from your server! There are also special modes like arena waves where you fight monsters, prop hunt mode where you can either hide from Hunter or hunt down the props with a gun, and there's last man standing which is my personal choice you find weapons and run around a map when the round starts you then kill other people and if you win you get a point! They have an amazing choice of props, weapons, tools, and entities. Some entities might include goblin, robot, friendly robot, invisible robot, giant, zombie, golem, ragdoll, and soldier! You can also change your character if you bought the bonus stuff but you can also find secrets around maps to gain characters, you can also get a uranium, and steel skeleton in arena waves by Getting to certain waves and you can even get different weapons by getting throughout the waves. You should play this game it's really fun and if you don't have friends to play with you could easily makes friends here! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

It’s an amazing game, especially for being free, definitely a must grab sandbox game… BUUUT they are talking about making it all “social hub” which I’m not down with, especially forced on startup. I’ll be fine if you start alone and join the hub, but if it’s forced upon me, it will probably be an immediate uninstall. At least it’s free!

Also, after seeing some reviews about toxicity… BE SMART ABOUT IT! Just stop playing public servers or just deal with it… it’s that simple. Yes, a ban list is a good idea, but just gather your friends in a private world… SIMPLE! This goes for so many other games too… STOP COMPLAINING! 😂
